meaning: int.表示轻蔑,不快的感叹词
examples: A total of 140 children were classified as having high PAH exposure.
Toxic matagenic and carcinogenic PAH diol epoxides can be derived from PAHS, which are responsible for most cases of lung cancer.
The Commission adopted the first guidelines for reducing polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAH) intake through final food preparation.
In conjunction with this label update, PAH patients receiving Letairis are no longer required to obtain monthly liver function tests.
The researchers looked at the level of chemicals linked with cancer, polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAH), in 12 patients after smoking.
